title: avenula marginata subsp. sulcata
intro: Avenula marginata subsp. sulcata, also known as Sulcate Avenula or Sulcate Oat-grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the genus Avenula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Avenula marginata subsp. sulcata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, capsules, or other supplements for medicinal purposes.
